subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-15 in Liverpool
subcodes.first_line: Tonight I am exceedingly happy to find myself in an assembly, the members of which are a recognized factor in philanthropy
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @war and peace, @unity; oneness of humanity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @prayer for peace and unity, @universal peace; world unity
